rationale: Educ. Code §12.251 defines terms for the adult high school charter school program. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: "Adult education" means services and instruction provided below the college level for adults by an eligible entity granted a charter under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns adult education charter definitions, unrelated to homestead exemption.
